name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_road_safety_audit_register
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_road_safety_audit_register' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`TriggeredSectionDetails-EndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`TriggeredSectionDetails-StartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ReportSubmissionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ReportSubmissionDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startpointname` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`startdistancepast` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`TriggeredSectionDetails-EndDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`TriggeredSectionDetails-StartDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ReportSubmissionDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ReportSubmissionDateTime` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'deltautc|modifiedutc|completeddate|createddate|createduser|startpointname|startdistancepast|TriggeredSectionDetails-EndDate|TriggeredSectionDetails-StartDate|ReportSubmissionDate|ReportSubmissionDateTime' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_road_safety_audit_register`
